series_metadata.series_title: Quarterly Computer Printout of Real Property Transactions used in Sales Ratio Study in Duplicate.
series_metadata.series_description: 1968 to 1972 and current year in office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current and three proceeding years of original retained in office file and then destroyed. Copy held for one year for use by county auditors etc. and then destroyed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Current and three preceding years of original retained in office file and then delete. Copy held for one year for use by county auditors etc. and then delete., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
